levels.name: Adopts
levels.description: actively learns and adopts the technology and tools defined by the team

levels.name: Specializes
levels.description: is the go-to person for one or more technologies and takes initiative to learn new ones

levels.name: Evangelizes
levels.description: researches, creates proofs of concept and introduces new technologies to the team

levels.name: Masters
levels.description: has very deep knowledge about the whole technology stack of the system

levels.name: Creates
levels.description: designs and creates new technologies that are widely used either by internal or external teams

levels.name: Enhances
levels.description: successfully pushes new features and bug fixes to improve and extend the system

levels.name: Designs
levels.description: designs and implements medium to large size features while reducing the system's tech debt

levels.name: Owns
levels.description: owns the production operation and monitoring of the system and is aware of its SLAs

levels.name: Evolves
levels.description: evolves the architecture to support future requirements and defines its SLAs

levels.name: Leads
levels.description: leads the technical excellence of the system and creates plans to mitigate outages

levels.name: Learns
levels.description: quickly learns from others and consistently steps up when it is required

levels.name: Supports
levels.description: proactively supports other team members and helps them to be successful

levels.name: Mentors
levels.description: mentors others to accelerate their career-growth and encourages them to participate

levels.name: Coordinates
levels.description: coordinates team members providing effective feedback and moderating discussions

levels.name: Manages
levels.description: manages the team members' career, expectations, performance and level of happiness

levels.name: Follows
levels.description: follows the team processes, delivering a consistent flow of features to production

levels.name: Enforces
levels.description: enforces the team processes, making sure everybody understands the benefits and tradeoffs

levels.name: Challenges
levels.description: challenges the team processes, looking for ways to improve them

levels.name: Adjusts
levels.description: adjusts the team processes, listening to feedback and guiding the team through the changes

levels.name: Defines
levels.description: defines the right processes for the team's maturity level, balancing agility and discipline

levels.name: Subsystem
levels.description: makes an impact on one or more subsystems

levels.name: Team
levels.description: makes an impact on the whole team, not just on specific parts of it

levels.name: Multiple Teams
levels.description: makes an impact not only on their team but also on other teams

levels.name: Company
levels.description: makes an impact on the whole tech organization

levels.name: Community
levels.description: makes an impact on the tech community
